emails.subject: Heartland Steel
emails.body: Heartland Steel Hi Patrice, Just wanted to give you something to look at when I'm talking to you.......call me when you get this. Thanks! Valerie Vela Specialist, Gas Settlements Enron Net Works LLC t: 713.345.8749 f: 713.646.8420

emails.subject: Heartland Steel
emails.body: Heartland Steel Hi Patrice, Just let me know when you'd like me to come down. Thanks! Valerie Vela Specialist, Gas Settlements Enron Net Works LLC t: 713.345.8749 f: 713.646.8420

emails.subject: RE: Heartland Steel
emails.body: RE: Heartland Steel okay, I will let you know. Thanks To: Mims, Patrice L.

emails.subject: Heartland Steel
emails.body: Heartland Steel Hi Patrice, I know it's never going to be a good time to take care of this deal, but we've got to do it sometime. Let me know what time is good for you. Please let me know the payment terms of the new deal, so that I can get with the new coordinator of this account. More specifically, are they still prepaying??? Since the name changed to "c," I will no longer be handling it. Bummer, huh? Thanks! Valerie Vela Specialist, Gas Settlements Enron Net Works LLC t: 713.345.8749 f: 713.646.8420

emails.subject: RE: Heartland Steel
emails.body: RE: Heartland Steel Sorry, I was not in the mood on Thursday/Friday and then my son broke his arm over the weekend, and I was out until today. For sure today, around 3:00, just come on up. Thanks To: Mims, Patrice L.

emails.subject: RE: Heartland Steel
emails.body: I understand...sorry about your son. I'll be up around 3:00 then. To: Vela, Valerie

emails.subject: Heartland Steel
emails.body: Heartland Steel Patrice--I'm working on the reconciliation and I've noticed that in Sitara for deal 1084719, the pricing is at Citygate GD for day 16. Did you go back in and change this? Let me know b/c the pricing is coming across in Unify as $2.29 rather than the $2.22833 you put in for the rest of the month. I'll send you the spreadsheet as soon as it's done...... Thanks! Valerie Vela Specialist, Gas Settlements Enron Net Works LLC t: 713.345.8749 f: 713.646.8420
